response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's profile is a near-complete mismatch for this role. His career is built on TypeScript, Node.js, and web/mobile development, with only a brief (~6-month) stint writing C and C++ components at National Instruments in 2014–2015. He has no demonstrable experience with C++ on Windows at any meaningful scale, no SQL Server or Oracle exposure, and zero financial-domain background — his one tangentially relevant role (RIDE Capital) used Node/TypeScript/GraphQL, not C++. Neither the mandatory nor the domain-expertise requirements are met.
strengths: Demonstrated CI/CD pipeline experience across multiple roles, an optional desirable skill
Java development background mentioned as optional, present in multiple engagements
Strong communication skills evidenced by conference talks and full-day workshops
concerns: C++ experience amounts to roughly 6 months (~2014–2015) versus the 5–10 years required; no evidence of Windows-platform C++ work
Zero financial-domain knowledge: no fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking exposure
No SQL Server or Oracle mentioned; listed SQL/MySQL skills do not satisfy the mandatory database requirement
